case_title: MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA VS. HAMID NASSAJ et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER AUTHORIZING SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NASSAJ, HAMID
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA SERVED MAY-04-2013, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCL.
ORDER RE GRANTING EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NASSAJ, HAMID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 111 JONES STREET, 	04, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $36.43 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT NASSAJ, HAMID
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT NASSAJ, HAMID DOES 1 TO 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA SERVED MAY-04-2013, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT NASSAJ, HAMID
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT NASSAJ, HAMID
